charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create dates and times

Source: R/date_time.R
date_time.Rd

Create dates and times

ch_timezone(n = 1)

ch_unix_time(n = 1)

ch_date_time(n = 1)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer

See also

DateTimeProvider

Examples

ch_timezone()

#> [[1]]
#> [[1]][[1]]
#> [1] "America/Grenada"
#> 
#> [[1]]$code
#> [1] "GD"
#> 
#> [[1]]$continent
#> [1] "North America"
#> 
#> [[1]]$name
#> [1] "Grenada"
#> 
#> [[1]]$capital
#> [1] "St. George's"
#> 
#> 
ch_timezone(10)

#> [[1]]
#> [[1]][[1]]
#> [1] "Europe/Oslo"
#> 
#> [[1]]$code
#> [1] "NO"
#> 
#> [[1]]$continent
#> [1] "Europe"
#> 
#> [[1]]$name
#> [1] "Norway"
#> 
#> [[1]]$capital
#> [1] "Oslo"
#> 
#> 
#> [[2]]
#> [[2]][[1]]
#> [1] "America/Santiago" "Pacific/Easter"  
#> 
#> [[2]]$code
#> [1] "CL"
#> 
#> [[2]]$continent
#> [1] "South America"
#> 
#> [[2]]$name
#> [1] "Chile"
#> 
#> [[2]]$capital
#> [1] "Santiago"
#> 
#> 
#> [[3]]
#> [[3]][[1]]
#> [1] "Asia/Rangoon"
#> 
#> [[3]]$code
#> [1] "MM"
#> 
#> [[3]]$continent
#> [1] "Asia"
#> 
#> [[3]]$name
#> [1] "Myanmar"
#> 
#> [[3]]$capital
#> [1] "Naypyidaw"
#> 
#> 
#> [[4]]
#> [[4]][[1]]
#> [1] "Asia/Amman"
#> 
#> [[4]]$code
#> [1] "JO"
#> 
#> [[4]]$continent
#> [1] "Asia"
#> 
#> [[4]]$name
#> [1] "Jordan"
#> 
#> [[4]]$capital
#> [1] "Amman"
#> 
#> 
#> [[5]]
#> [[5]][[1]]
#> [1] "Europe/Zagreb"
#> 
#> [[5]]$code
#> [1] "HR"
#> 
#> [[5]]$continent
#> [1] "Europe"
#> 
#> [[5]]$name
#> [1] "Croatia"
#> 
#> [[5]]$capital
#> [1] "Zagreb"
#> 
#> 
#> [[6]]
#> [[6]][[1]]
#> [1] "America/El_Salvador"
#> 
#> [[6]]$code
#> [1] "SV"
#> 
#> [[6]]$continent
#> [1] "North America"
#> 
#> [[6]]$name
#> [1] "El Salvador"
#> 
#> [[6]]$capital
#> [1] "San Salvador"
#> 
#> 
#> [[7]]
#> [[7]][[1]]
#> [1] "Europe/Paris"
#> 
#> [[7]]$code
#> [1] "FR"
#> 
#> [[7]]$continent
#> [1] "Europe"
#> 
#> [[7]]$name
#> [1] "France"
#> 
#> [[7]]$capital
#> [1] "Paris"
#> 
#> 
#> [[8]]
#> [[8]][[1]]
#> [1] "Africa/Luanda"
#> 
#> [[8]]$code
#> [1] "AO"
#> 
#> [[8]]$continent
#> [1] "Africa"
#> 
#> [[8]]$name
#> [1] "Angola"
#> 
#> [[8]]$capital
#> [1] "Luanda"
#> 
#> 
#> [[9]]
#> [[9]][[1]]
#> [1] "America/Bogota"
#> 
#> [[9]]$code
#> [1] "CO"
#> 
#> [[9]]$continent
#> [1] "South America"
#> 
#> [[9]]$name
#> [1] "Colombia"
#> 
#> [[9]]$capital
#> [1] "Bogotá"
#> 
#> 
#> [[10]]
#> [[10]][[1]]
#> [1] "Africa/Asmera"
#> 
#> [[10]]$code
#> [1] "ER"
#> 
#> [[10]]$continent
#> [1] "Africa"
#> 
#> [[10]]$name
#> [1] "Eritrea"
#> 
#> [[10]]$capital
#> [1] "Asmara"
#> 
#> 

ch_unix_time()

#> [1] 1033737576
ch_unix_time(20)

#>  [1]  889590521  588612117  853186909  568962611 1505608587  841133309
#>  [7] 1162908623  760065480   18875681 1113658585 1418931566 1616983203
#> [13]  637079596 1519867233  928333300  356926065  350319413  310632520
#> [19]  537613495  839576958

ch_date_time()

#> [1] "1980-10-25 11:21:49 UTC"
ch_date_time(20)

#> [[1]]
#> [1] "2007-03-24 02:50:39 UTC"
#> 
#> [[2]]
#> [1] "2005-05-27 13:40:57 UTC"
#> 
#> [[3]]
#> [1] "1975-03-31 08:48:37 UTC"
#> 
#> [[4]]
#> [1] "1996-05-04 04:06:11 UTC"
#> 
#> [[5]]
#> [1] "1983-03-28 04:24:04 UTC"
#> 
#> [[6]]
#> [1] "1990-09-15 08:41:50 UTC"
#> 
#> [[7]]
#> [1] "2019-08-14 13:31:46 UTC"
#> 
#> [[8]]
#> [1] "2012-11-22 07:36:07 UTC"
#> 
#> [[9]]
#> [1] "1976-12-15 11:09:36 UTC"
#> 
#> [[10]]
#> [1] "2015-06-22 12:16:29 UTC"
#> 
#> [[11]]
#> [1] "1988-10-29 22:26:09 UTC"
#> 
#> [[12]]
#> [1] "2010-10-08 08:42:07 UTC"
#> 
#> [[13]]
#> [1] "1977-04-01 17:58:18 UTC"
#> 
#> [[14]]
#> [1] "1987-08-15 20:32:57 UTC"
#> 
#> [[15]]
#> [1] "1997-01-11 05:44:18 UTC"
#> 
#> [[16]]
#> [1] "1971-10-10 07:23:15 UTC"
#> 
#> [[17]]
#> [1] "2001-08-28 15:35:34 UTC"
#> 
#> [[18]]
#> [1] "2018-09-17 11:18:57 UTC"
#> 
#> [[19]]
#> [1] "1986-02-06 16:10:58 UTC"
#> 
#> [[20]]
#> [1] "2012-06-10 10:01:13 UTC"
#>
